studies.title: CARNA - Evaluation study to assess medical benefits and positive care effects of app-based, guideline-compliant patient support in heart failure

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions the ProHerz app as the software application being evaluated for its medical benefits and positive care effects in heart failure. The trial registration and full text confirm ProHerz as the intervention under investigation.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'clinical controlled study' with a comparison between control and intervention groups, indicating randomization and controlled trial conditions typical of an RCT.
